features: Compact Plastic Pots: These plastic pots are perfect for packaging small quantities of your products. They are made of high-quality, durable plastic that can withstand everyday use.
Sauce Pots with Lids: Ideal for sauces, dips, and condiments, these sauce pots with lids securely seal in freshness and prevent leaks, ensuring your sauces stay in perfect condition.
Versatile Deli Pots: Not just for the deli, these pots are also great for storing spices, crafting materials, and even small hardware items. They're the perfect size for saving space.
Sauce Cups with Lids: These sauce cups with lids are the ultimate solution for portion control, meal prep, and storing small items. They're great for home, school, or office use.
Containers with Lids: These plastic round containers with lids are designed to be stackable, making them easy to store and transport. They're the perfect choice for businesses and households.
description: Product Description Compact Plastic Pots These compact plastic pots are ideal for packaging small quantities of products. Crafted from high-quality, durable plastic, they are built to withstand the rigours of everyday use. Stackable Plastic Containers with Lids These round plastic containers with lids are stackable, making them easy to store and transport. They're an excellent choice for businesses and households alike. Leak-Proof Sauce Pots with Lids Perfect for storing sauces, dips, and condiments, these sauce pots come with secure lids that lock in freshness and prevent leaks, keeping your sauces in impeccable condition. Versatile Deli Pots More than just deli containers, these versatile deli pots are suitable for storing spices, crafting supplies, or even small hardware items. Their compact size helps save valuable space. Portioned Sauce Cups with Lids Designed for portion control, meal prep, and organising small items, these sauce cups with lids are a convenient option for use at home, school, or the office.
